_comment: Long-term pick ledger. /weekly-longterm logs each conviction pick with its entry price, fair value, key assumption, and thesis indicators; each weekly run checkpoints price + QQQ + indicators via tools/lt_ledger.py. A pick must BEAT QQQ (positive excess) to justify itself — else just own the index. Theses resolve over years; track the indicators for faster feedback.

entries.thesis: SMB system-of-record (QuickBooks) + consumer-tax data lock-in (TurboTax); AI (Intuit Assist) is moat-accretive, runs on proprietary data rivals cannot replicate. Reverse-DCF prices in only ~3% growth vs 12-15% actual.
entries.key_assumption: durable revenue growth stays >=8% (vs ~3% implied by price); Direct File stays confined to the low-margin simple-return tail

entries.thesis: De-rated creative/document/experience SaaS at ~7.5x fwd P/E, 11% FCF yield; reverse-DCF prices in NEGATIVE growth while ARR still +13% and AI-first ARR tripled to >M. Asymmetric value-with-optionality, NOT a sleep-easy compounder.
entries.key_assumption: AI is a tailwind not an existential disruptor; net-new Digital Media ARR does NOT turn negative (kill-switch)
